skill.name: ai-image-generation
skill.description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image
skill.summary: Generate AI images with 50+ models including FLUX, Gemini, Grok, and Seedream via inference.sh CLI
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: All 44 static findings are false positives. The skill is pure documentation with example commands - no actual code execution, no cryptographic operations, and no malicious network requests. External command patterns are bash examples in markdown code blocks. Network URLs are legitimate documentation links to inference.sh service. This skill is safe for publication.

medium_findings.title: Documentation Commands Detected
medium_findings.description: The static scanner detected 'external_commands' patterns at 35 locations in SKILL.md. These are bash command examples in markdown code blocks (```bash ... ```), not actual shell execution in code. This is standard documentation practice.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: These are markdown code blocks showing example CLI commands, not actual Ruby/shell execution. The backtick syntax is documentation formatting, not code execution.

medium_findings.title: Documentation URLs Detected
medium_findings.description: The static scanner detected 'network' patterns at 8 locations. These are legitimate documentation URLs to inference.sh service and example image URLs in documentation.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to inference.sh documentation or example image URLs in documentation. These are legitimate external references for the service being documented.

medium_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
medium_findings.description: The static scanner flagged line 3 as containing a 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. This appears to be a false positive - line 3 only contains a description string with model names, no cryptographic code exists.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 3 contains only a YAML description field with model names. No cryptographic algorithms or operations are present in this file.

content.value_statement: Create stunning AI-generated images using FLUX, Gemini, Grok, and more models through a simple CLI interface. Perfect for designers, marketers, and developers needing quick image generation.
actual_capabilities: Generate images with 50+ AI models including FLUX, Gemini, Grok, and Seedream
Create text-to-image artwork with custom prompts
Upscale images to 4K quality using Topaz
Render text in images with Reve model
Stitch multiple images together horizontally or vertically
Access specialized models for product photos, landscapes, and artistic styles
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI (infsh) installation and account
Image generation credits purchased separately through inference.sh
Network connectivity required to access inference.sh servers
Some models have aspect ratio and resolution restrictions

use_cases.title: Quick Product Mockups
use_cases.description: Generate professional product photos for e-commerce listings using FLUX or Seedream models with custom prompts.

use_cases.title: Concept Art Creation
use_cases.description: Create concept art and illustrations for games, stories, or creative projects using various artistic style models.

use_cases.title: Social Media Graphics
use_cases.description: Generate eye-catching visuals for social media posts, ads, and marketing campaigns with text rendering support.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image using FLUX Dev: infsh app run falai/flux-dev-lora --input '{"prompt": "[your description here]"}'
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick image generation with default settings

prompt_templates.title: Fast Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a fast image with FLUX Klein: infsh app run falai/flux-2-klein-lora --input '{"prompt": "[your description]"}'
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need quick results with lower resource usage

prompt_templates.title: Text Rendering
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an image with text: infsh app run falai/reve --input '{"prompt": "A poster that says [TEXT] in bold letters"}'
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating images with readable text or signage

prompt_templates.title: 4K Quality Output
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate high-quality 4K image: infsh app run bytedance/seedream-4-5 --input '{"prompt": "[your description]"}'
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need cinematic quality output

output_examples.input: infsh app run falai/flux-dev-lora --input '{"prompt": "a cat astronaut in space"}'
output_examples.output: Returns an AI-generated image of a cat astronaut in space, downloaded to the current directory

output_examples.input: infsh app run falai/reve --input '{"prompt": "A poster that says HELLO WORLD in bold letters"}'
output_examples.output: Returns an image with clear, readable text "HELLO WORLD" rendered on a poster

output_examples.input: infsh app run bytedance/seedream-4-5 --input '{"prompt": "cinematic portrait of a woman, golden hour lighting"}'
output_examples.output: Returns a high-quality 4K cinematic portrait with professional lighting

best_practices: Use specific, detailed prompts for better results - include lighting, style, and composition details
Start with FLUX Klein for quick iterations, then upscale with Seedream 4.5 for final output
Use the Reve model when you need accurate text rendering in your images
Check available models with 'infsh app list --category image' to find the best tool for your needs
anti_patterns: Do not expect perfect text rendering with FLUX models - use Reve or Seedream 3.0 for text
Do not skip the login step - you must authenticate with 'infsh login' before generating images
Do not use extremely long prompts - keep descriptions concise and focused on key elements

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI?
faq.answer: Run: npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools to install the inference.sh CLI with all tools.

faq.question: Do I need to pay for image generation?
faq.answer: Yes, you need credits purchased through inference.sh. Sign up at inference.sh and purchase credits to start generating.

faq.question: Which model is best for text rendering?
faq.answer: Use Reve or Seedream 3.0 for accurate text rendering. FLUX models do not handle text well.

faq.question: Can I generate images locally?
faq.answer: No, this skill uses inference.sh cloud API. You need internet connectivity to use it.

faq.question: What is the fastest model available?
faq.answer: FLUX.2 Klein (falai/flux-2-klein-lora) is the fastest option, good for quick iterations.

faq.question: How do I upscale an existing image?
faq.answer: Use: infsh app run falai/topaz-image-upscaler --input '{"image_url": "https://..."}' to upscale images to 4K.
